tool_response_summary: Successfully retrieved 10 API tokens. Tokens include MCP-DOCS, CLI, CLI2, CLI3, CUrsor, MCP, gitlab-deploy variants. Most have api_read and api_write roles. Some have expiration dates (e.g., MCP expires 2026-06-06).
execution_notes: Tool executed without errors. Returned comprehensive list of API tokens with descriptions, roles, creation dates, and expiration dates where applicable. Response time: 52.81ms. Tier 0 tool worked as expected.
